Theorem oveq2 7404
Description: Equality theorem for operation value. (Contributed by NM, 28-Feb-1995.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
oveq2 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → (𝐶𝐹𝐴) = (𝐶𝐹𝐵))
Proof of Theorem oveq2
StepHypRef Expression
1 opeq2 4832 . . 3 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → ⟨𝐶, 𝐴⟩ = ⟨𝐶, 𝐵⟩)
21fveq2d 6871 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → (𝐹‘⟨𝐶, 𝐴⟩) = (𝐹‘⟨𝐶, 𝐵⟩))
3 df-ov 7399 . 2 ⊢ (𝐶𝐹𝐴) = (𝐹‘⟨𝐶, 𝐴⟩)
4 df-ov 7399 . 2 ⊢ (𝐶𝐹𝐵) = (𝐹‘⟨𝐶, 𝐵⟩)
52, 3, 43eqtr4g 2822 1 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → (𝐶𝐹𝐴) = (𝐶𝐹𝐵))
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   = wceq 1560  ⟨cop 4588  ‘cfv 6521  (class class class)co 7396
